item.title: Phone clearing dump pt 7
item.description:
How can you have any pudding if you haven't eaten your meat??!
You never know what you'll see on the greenock train. I was once the weird passenger, I'd dressed as the wicked witch for work Halloween contest and had to get the 5pm train still wearing the green make up
Potato tax - she steals my comfy nest and rearranges the squishmallows

No it's not.
item.dc:creator: Mirrormancer

item.title: 11 years later…I have never been happier. Trans healthcare saves.
item.description: 11 years ago, I was ready to end it, then I took a chance. I found the Care I needed, and I was able to treat my dysphoria successfully! As of this last year, I am completely through the process, and I have never been more excited to wake up every morning. Lately I’ve been discovering my own sense of style, getting used to shopping discovering myself for the first time and really just enjoying being a woman. The woman I was always meant to be. Trans healthcare saves lives, it’s as simple as that. Never lose Hope and remember, I love you. ❤️
item.dc:creator: SlanderousLici

item.title: This is the type of performance I want to see live
item.dc:creator: Stinkwrinkle

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1374 (Star Trek Sunday again)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
I don't honestly know how much longer I'm gonna last.
I am becoming more unhinged. I feel it. I feel crumbly, like drought-scorched earth. Dusty.
If there was a local billionaire, I'd probably end up trying to use that as a way out of existence tbh.
Everything I know about sports that I didn't learn from Terry Pratchett's Unseen Academicals was against my will.
I'll be starting Voyager soon.
Too bad, you will. Just like everyone else human I've tried to date.
This also means Frasier was a Holodeck program, and I'm okay with that.
I don't normally partake but I would with these two lol
If any of you are protesting out there in LA, give them hell. I wish I could join you.
Amen to that, Jake. I love all you ladies.
Me, for like two hours daily now.
I wonder if everyone was as outraged about DS9 as they were about the "wokeness" of Discovery.
Filing this statement for later use.
Yup.
Pippin tax. Today's message from Pippin: "I love you too!" [alarm calls] "thank you, thank you." [Kissing noises] ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: It's definitely a non scale victory for me!
item.description: Not a beach towel, but an actual "normal" sized bath towel. I'm so fucking happy. I'm on a weight loss journey. 77ish pounds down from 285. Send inappropriate gifs, memes and your favorite playlist to work out to!
item.dc:creator: Sugarbritches21

I feel bad for her but oh my word is that a funny excuse
My bus driver in high school always chose me because I was his favorite
Me
I bow to our swamp queen @vudumommajuju
She actually said she got pregnant because they used the hot tub together
Me
Did you guys know Jon hamm lit someone on fire
So Big Mama met Nessie
Liza Jane tax

item.title: The bots need some new material
item.dc:creator: malbec

item.title: Added some OYGBIV to my very R neighborhood!
item.description: My first post! I feel like it's a good time to convey a little hope and positivity...It's not much, but we wanted to show support in an area that's very red. Need to adjust the lights a bit, but I think it looks nice. Hang in there everyone and stay weird! Just wanted to thank everyone for the enthusiastic response. Love the 'tude this community has! Being unique is celebrated and I love it!
item.dc:creator: Psychedelifragilisticexpialidocious

item.title: How I made an LED Hatsune Miku Headset - YuzuPyon Cosplay Tutorial
item.description: Full tutorial : https://youtu.be/dd4nxIbF4q0 Hello everyone! Here's how I made my Hatsune Miku Headset that lights up with LEDs! I made a full tutorial more in depth if you're interested in learning how to make it yourself or if you are simply curious to see the detailed step by step, check out the link above :) I wish you all a great day, YuzuPyon
